notableEvents.label: Colby Thomas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Colby Thomas grounds into a force out, third baseman Edmundo Sosa to second baseman Bryson Stott. Brent Rooker out at 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Bryce Harper reaches on a fielder's choice. Kyle Schwarber to 2nd. Kyle Schwarber advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by second baseman Jeff McNeil.

notableEvents.label: Bryson Stott pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jonah Heim challenged (pitch result), call on the field was overturned: Bryson Stott called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Bryson Stott pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Bryson Stott singles on a ground ball to right fielder Lawrence Butler. Edmundo Sosa to 3rd. Brandon Marsh to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Justin Crawford pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Justin Crawford grounds out, pitcher Hogan Harris to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Edmundo Sosa scores. Brandon Marsh to 3rd. Bryson Stott to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run
